flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Waynesburg University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.1k vs 1.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Waynesburg University rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($15.7k → $17.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Waynesburg University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($27.4k → $30.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Waynesburg University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
